title: The Dad Collective
description: Pictures of my dad as my model out at the DTC in Colorado.
story: My dad and I were out one day- at the DTC, getting lunch- and I wanted to take some photos. So, I asked him to be my model! He kept saying he wouldn't look good on camera lol. He was wrong! Some of these photos may look slightly better than others because... my sister edited a few of them!
